name: testDeleteActiveFraudControlNotAddedToBusinessUnit
description: Delete Active Fraud Control not added to Business Unit
descriptionHtml: Delete Active Fraud Control not added to Business Unit

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0827.083147.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Delete Active Fraud Control not added to Business Unit

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Check if just deleted Fraud Control still presented in the table
